subject: [PATCH v3 06/20] ntfs3: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch updates the ntfs3 file system to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which is generated using the DEFINE_IOMAP_ITER_NEXT_END() macro. This change does not introduce any functional changes but rather adapts the existing iomap operations to conform to the new interface. The update affects the inode.c file in the fs/ntfs3 directory.
